CHAMP1 complex promotes heterochromatin assembly and reduces replication stress

evidence_entities.text: CHAMP1-deficient cells exhibited increased sensitivity to RS-inducing agents, including HU, aphidicolin, and cisplatin
CHAMP1 KO cells exhibited increased levels of RS markers, including phosphorylated KAP1 and CHK1
CHAMP1 is recruited to stalled replication forks by HU treatment
HU treatment increased H3K9me3 and H3K9me2 at the stressed replication sites
CHAMP1 depletion led to elevated levels of FANCM, other Fanconi anemia proteins, and RS proteins at telomeres
CHAMP1 complex mRNA levels strongly correlate with CCNE1 mRNA expression
